# CWE-378 safe: Creation of Temporary File With Insecure Permissions (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-378-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func SaveUploadBuffer(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	job := r.URL.Query().Get("job")
	chunk := r.FormValue("chunk")
	if job == "" || chunk == "" {
		http.Error(w, "job and chunk required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	f, err := os.CreateTemp("", "upload-*.bin")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	defer f.Close()
	if err := os.Chmod(f.Name(), 0600); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	if _, err := f.Write([]byte(chunk)); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
